# SpeakPath

> AI-powered conversational language practice — speak and improve, no downloads required.

SpeakPath is a web application that helps language learners build real conversational fluency through AI-driven voice conversations. Unlike flashcard or grammar-drill apps, SpeakPath puts learners in live spoken exchanges with an AI that listens, responds naturally, and gives targeted feedback. No download required. Free to start.

## What SpeakPath Does

- **Voice-first practice**: Users speak aloud; the AI listens and responds in the target language in real time.
- **Supported languages**: English, Spanish, French, German (more coming: Portuguese, Italian, Japanese, Mandarin).
- **Skill levels**: Beginner through Advanced — conversations adapt to the learner's current level.
- **Instant feedback**: Pronunciation hints, vocabulary suggestions, and fluency notes after each exchange.
- **No install needed**: Runs entirely in the browser at https://app.speakpath.dev.
- **Private by design**: Voice recordings are never stored longer than needed.

## How It Works

1. Choose your target language and proficiency level.
2. Start talking — the AI listens and responds naturally in real time.
3. Review grammar insights, vocabulary notes, and progress after each session.

## Who It's For

Language learners who already know some basics and want to break through the "I studied for years but can't hold a conversation" plateau. Also useful for travelers, professionals preparing for interviews, and heritage speakers reconnecting with a family language.

## Languages

- English (Business & everyday fluency)
- Spanish (500M+ native speakers)
- French (Romance language, culture, opportunity)
- German (Precision, science, career growth)
- More coming soon: Portuguese, Italian, Japanese, Mandarin

## Pricing

Free tier available. No credit card required to start.

## Key URLs

- Landing page: https://speakpath.dev
- App: https://app.speakpath.dev
- Sign in: https://app.speakpath.dev/login

## About

SpeakPath is an independent product focused on making conversational fluency accessible through AI voice technology.
